content.problemStatement:
Chef participated in a contest and got a rank XXX.

Chef is trying to find his name in the ranklist but there are too many pages.

Each page consists of 252525 participants. Chef wants to find the exact page number which contains his name.

Help Chef find the page number.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of a single integer XXX - denoting the rank of Chef.


Output Format
For each test case, output the page number of the ranklist containing Chef's name.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each of the next T lines contains a single integer X, the rank of Chef.
content.outputFormat: For each test case output a single line containing the page number that contains the rank X.

sampleTestCases.explanation: Rank 25 is the last entry on page 1.\nRank 26 starts page 2.\nRank 1000 -> (1000+24)/25 = 40.

solution.approach: Each page holds exactly 25 participants. The page number for a rank X is ceil(X / 25). Using integer arithmetic, this can be computed as (X + 24) / 25. Process each test case independently.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) – constant work per test case.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few variables are used.
